title: Bridge Essay: Mind and body connection in expert meditators: a computational study based on ce

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.

**Mind and body connection in expert meditators: acomputational study based on central and peripheral nervous system.** — BMC complementary medicine and therapies (2024). PMID: . DOI: 10.3390/s23156983. Score: 21. Ameditative 'technique' is conceived as acontinuum of different affective states involving mind and body jointly. Meditative practices can involve cognitive effort (e.g., focused attention and open-minded techniques), as well as automatic and implicit practices (e.g., transcendental techniques). The NGALSO tantric self-healing meditation technique is abrief, comprehensive meditation technique relying on mind and body connection.
